task.title: Submitting multiple jobs
task.shortdesc: You can select multiple JCL files to submit.

step.cmd: From the Remote Systems view or view, expand the folders to display the names of the JCL members you want to submit.
Select one or more JCL members.
Right-click and select Submit or press Ctrl+Alt+M.
step.stepresult: The Job Submission Confirmation window opens.

step.cmd: To see a list of jobs and their status, click Details.
To locate the jobs in the Remote Systems view, select one or more jobs in the list and click Locate Jobs.
step.info: You can select jobs individually or click the Select All and Deselect All to select jobs. The Select All button selects only the last 10 jobs on the list and the Locate Jobs action locates only the last 10 successfully submitted jobs.
step.stepresult: Located jobs are added to the Retrieved Jobs filter of the JES subsystem.
